messages.content: Hey everyone! 😊 Hope you’re all having a good day. Anyone up for some plans this weekend?
Hey Iris! I’d love to do something this weekend 😊 Any ideas what you’re in the mood for?
I’m in too! Maybe a picnic or a movie night? Weather’s supposed to be nice, so outdoors could be fun 🌳🎬
Ooo a picnic sounds awesome! I could whip up some snacks to bring. Does Saturday work for everyone?
Saturday works for me! Picnic sounds perfect. I can bring some drinks or maybe bake something if people are in the mood for sweets 🍪
Saturday’s great for me too! I can bring some fruit or a salad. Can’t wait to hang out and soak up the sun ☀️
Awesome, looks like Saturday is shaping up nicely! Anyone have a park in mind, or should we just meet at our usual spot?
Our usual spot works for me! It’s always chill there and close for everyone. Maybe we can bring some games too? I’ve got a frisbee and a deck of cards I can toss in my bag!
Love the idea of games! I’ve got that big picnic blanket we used last time, so I’ll bring that along. Looking forward to Saturday already 😄
Sounds perfect! I’ll bring a speaker too, so we can have some tunes going. Let me know if anyone wants to coordinate snacks so we don’t double up! Can't wait for Saturday! 🎶🍉
This is coming together so well! I’ll make a pasta salad and maybe some cookies. Diana, I’ll DM you about snacks so we can coordinate. Super excited to see everyone!

Awesome, Alice! Thanks for organizing the snacks with Diana. I’ll grab some chips and maybe a dip too, just in case. Can’t wait to see everyone and chill in the sun! If anyone has any last minute requests, let me know!
Yay, thanks Jack! This is gonna be so much fun. If anyone has a playlist they want to share for the day, drop it in here! Also—Grace, you bringing your legendary lemonade? 😏
Ooh, Grace’s lemonade is a must! And I can throw together a playlist if no one else wants to—just send over songs you want included. This is shaping up to be the chillest Saturday ever!
This is making me hungry already 😂 I’ll bring some ice for the drinks and maybe pick up a few extra snacks on my way. Count me in on the games too—frisbee rematch, anyone?
Haha, Bob’s coming in clutch with the ice! We definitely need a frisbee rematch—redemption time for me 😂 Frank, I’ll DM you a couple of songs for the playlist. This is gonna be such a good day!

Love the energy in here! I’ll bring some cold drinks—maybe a couple sodas and iced tea. Also, dibs on being on Alice’s frisbee team this time, I need that winning luck 😎 Let me know if we’re missing anything!

This is all sounding amazing, you guys! I’ll bring some fruit (maybe a watermelon or some berries) to keep things fresh and summery 🍉🫐 Can’t wait to see everyone and soak up some sun. Charlie, save me a spot on your team if you switch it up!

Love all these snack and drink plans! I’ll bring some hummus and veggies too, just to balance out all the cookies and chips 😂 Eve, watermelon sounds perfect for a sunny day. Looks like we’re going to have a feast!

This is honestly going to be a feast and a half 😂 Appreciate everyone pitching in! I’ll make sure my playlist vibes with sunny park energy—open to all song recs, so don’t be shy. Also, someone please document Jack’s frisbee redemption arc for posterity!

Lol, I’ll totally be on filming duty for that frisbee showdown—gotta get those highlights (and possible fails) for the group chat 😂 Also, can confirm I’ll be showing up early to snag a good spot at the park! See you all soon!

This is all coming together so perfectly! I’ll bring some extra cups and napkins just in case we need them. Also, can someone remind me—are we doing blankets or does anyone have those foldy chairs? Either way, I’m so ready for sunshine and snacks ☀️

Great thinking, Iris! I’ve got a couple of blankets I can bring, but if anyone has those foldy chairs, definitely toss them in your car. Can’t have too many comfy spots to chill. And thanks for backup cups—someone always forgets!

I can toss a foldy chair in my trunk, no problem! Good call on the extra blankets too—always nice to sprawl out. Iris, thanks for bringing cups and napkins, we’d 100% forget otherwise 😅 This is going to be such a vibe!

Awesome, looks like we’re set on all the essentials! I’ll throw in my speaker and a couple of card games just in case we need a break from running around. If anyone wants to try a group photo this time, I’ll bring my tripod too. Can’t wait for park day, it’s gonna be legendary!
I just found out that penguins have knees!

Frank coming in with the pro-level prep! Card games and a tripod? We’re gonna have content for days 😂 If anyone wants to teach me a new game, I’m all in—I only know how to lose at Uno. This is shaping up to be the park hang of the year!
This is honestly getting

needle_message: I just found out that penguins have knees!
